rationale: Plan creates a single new module (src/input/pointer.ts) following the established input/ pattern from signals.ts. Uses Pointer Events API for unified mouse/touch handling, normalizes to 0–1 viewport space, and exposes a snapshot-only interface with no persistence. Integration into main.ts is minimal (two lines). No new dependencies, no architectural changes, no impact on existing modules.

concerns.detail: Plan correctly identifies the need for { passive: true } on pointermove for touch. Ensure this is applied to avoid scroll-blocking warnings.
Plan defers render loop integration to a future story (mappings). The getState() snapshot pattern is clean and will compose well when that wiring happens.

existingPatternAlignment: high — mirrors signals.ts interface style (typed interface + pure function export), matches resize.ts cleanup convention (destroy/detach pattern), follows established test patterns (vitest + jsdom + privacy checks)
acceptanceCoverage: full — all four acceptance criteria are addressed with clear implementation steps and corresponding tests
estimatedComplexityAgreement: agree — low complexity, single module with well-defined scope
